news_text: TCS wins $2B multi-year cloud transformation deal with a major US bank. Analysts see 15% upside potential. Q3 revenue beat estimates by 4%. Management raised full-year guidance citing strong deal pipeline. Institutional investors increased holdings by 2% this quarter.

Infosys faces headwinds as key client delays $500M contract renewal. Attrition rate climbed to 18%. CFO warned of margin pressure in FY27. Two major brokerages downgraded the stock to HOLD. Insider selling reported by senior executives last week.
